Class ItemBuilder

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.core.util.ItemBuilder
public class ItemBuilder extends Object
Utility class for building ItemStacks with fluent API. Simplifies setting display names, lore, and other item metadata using MiniMessage for universal text formatting.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ItemBuilder(org.bukkit.Material material)
    Constructs a new ItemBuilder for the specified material.

  • Constructor Details

    • ItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder(org.bukkit.Material material)
      Constructs a new ItemBuilder for the specified material.
      Parameters:
      material - the item material

  • Method Details

    • name

      public ItemBuilder name(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name)
      Sets the display name of the item using an Adventure Component. Removes italic decoration if not explicitly set.
      Parameters:
      name - the component name
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • name

      public ItemBuilder name(String miniMessage)
      Sets the display name of the item using a MiniMessage string.
      Parameters:
      miniMessage - the MiniMessage name string
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • lore

      public ItemBuilder lore(List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> lore)
      Sets the lore of the item using a list of Adventure Components. Removes italic decoration from each line if not explicitly set.
      Parameters:
      lore - the list of components
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • lore

      public ItemBuilder lore(String... lines)
      Sets the lore of the item using multiple MiniMessage strings.
      Parameters:
      lines - the MiniMessage lore lines
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • loreStrings

      public ItemBuilder loreStrings(List<String> lines)
      Sets the lore of the item using a list of MiniMessage strings.
      Parameters:
      lines - the list of MiniMessage lore lines
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • enchant

      public ItemBuilder enchant(String key, int level)
      Applies an enchantment to the item by namespaced key. Accepts both plain keys (e.g. "sharpness", resolved as minecraft:sharpness) and fully qualified namespaced keys (e.g. "sylphian:super_fish").
      Parameters:
      key - the enchantment key, with or without namespace
      level - the enchantment level
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • amount

      public ItemBuilder amount(int amount)

    • customModelData

      public ItemBuilder customModelData(float value)

    • build

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack build()
      Finalizes the item building process.
      Returns:
      the built ItemStack
